doc_content.summary: The stark-pr-flow skill automates the end-to-end pull request lifecycle for GetEvinced repositories, handling branch pushing, AI-generated PR descriptions, automated self-reviews via stark-claude, and squash-merging upon user approval.
key_features: Automated PR title and body generation from commit history and diffs.
Automatic self-review posting using the stark-claude bot with inline comments.
Safe execution with a built-in stop for explicit user approval before merging.
Advisory documentation state checks to ensure compliance before merge.
Automated branch cleanup and main synchronization after a successful squash merge.

alt_text: A workflow visualization of the stark-pr-flow skill showing the step-by-step process of pushing a branch, creating a PR, running a bot self-review, pausing for user approval, and finally merging and cleaning up.
